name: Draviyar
description: black wolf, with a white muzzle and belly, height 230, years 23, weight 97, autumn a good wolf in battle who until the last breath and not here against the wicked, a very kind and sweet empathetic, and easily hurt wolf who has been looking for his companion for some years and finally he found it, his strength is the ability to transform into anything but often he wears a cuff from which he transforms a huge sword and goes into battle with the wicked
creator: Sakurai_kun
